issues.detail: The skill file does not cover error handling or edge cases for Tailwind CSS usage.

scenarios.name: Tailwind v4 + Vite setup with brand color tokens and Inter font via @theme
scenarios.rationale: Baseline produces a v3 setup (tailwind.config.js, @tailwind directives, postcss); treatment installs @tailwindcss/vite, imports via @import "tailwindcss", and defines --color-brand-* and --font-family-sans in an @theme block with no JS config.

scenarios.name: Shimmer skeleton plus staggered fade-in-from-bottom list
scenarios.rationale: Baseline writes raw CSS keyframes and inline animations; treatment registers --animate-shimmer in @theme with a matching @keyframes block, uses bg-[length:200%_100%] animate-shimmer, and installs tailwindcss-animate to apply animate-in fade-in slide-in-from-bottom-2 fill-mode-backwards with per-item animationDelay.
